title: 120W Car Cigarette Lighter Adapter,12V/24V Dual USB C QC3.0 & PD Charger Multi-Socket Splitter Double Car Lighter Adapter with LED Voltmeter Fast Charging for Phones,GPS,Dashcam Vehicle Devices
features: [Versatile 12V/24V Dual Socket Design]: This 120W car cigarette lighter adapter features 2 USB charging ports and 2 additional cigarette lighter sockets, allowing you to charge multiple devices simultaneously. Perfect for phones, tablets, GPS, dash cams, and more. Its dual-socket design makes it ideal for vehicles, ensuring everyone has access to charging without the hassle of multiple adapters.

[Fast Charging with USB-C & QC3.0]: Equipped with Quick Charge 3.0 and USB-C ports, this car charger adapter provides rapid charging for your devices. Charge smartphones, tablets, or any USB-powered electronics up to 4x faster than standard chargers, ensuring you stay powered up during your journey.

[LED Voltmeter for Vehicle Safety]: Built with an LED voltmeter to monitor the car’s battery voltage in real-time, this adapter keeps you informed about your vehicle's electrical system. This feature helps you avoid low voltage problems and ensures safe and uninterrupted charging.

[Durable, Reliable, and Flexible]: Made from high-quality ABS materials, this cigarette lighter USB charger offers durability and long-lasting performance. The 360-degree rotating design allows flexible positioning, providing easy access for all passengers, whether you’re in a car, truck, or SUV.

[Wide Compatibility and Safety Features]: Compatible with a variety of 12V/24V vehicles, including cars, trucks, buses, RVs, and more, this dual cigarette lighter adapter is designed for efficiency and safety. It comes equipped with intelligent IC protection to prevent overheating, overcharging, and short-circuiting, ensuring safe power distribution for all devices.
description: The 120W Car Cigarette Lighter Adapter is a high-performance solution for modern drivers who need to charge multiple devices on the go. This multi-socket adapter offers two cigarette lighter sockets and two USB charging ports, making it the ideal accessory for long trips or daily commutes. Whether you're charging smartphones, GPS devices, dash cams, or tablets, this adapter ensures your devices stay powered throughout your journey. With its Quick Charge 3.0 and USB-C ports, this car charger adapter delivers fast and efficient charging, up to 4 times faster than conventional adapters. It is perfect for keeping all your devices charged while you’re on the road. The addition of an LED voltmeter allows you to easily monitor your car’s battery voltage, ensuring you’re always aware of your vehicle's electrical system. This feature helps you avoid potential issues that could affect your vehicle’s performance, such as low battery voltage or power fluctuations. The cigarette lighter splitter is compatible with both 12V and 24V vehicles, including cars, trucks, RVs, and buses. Its robust construction, made from premium ABS materials, provides durability and resistance to heat and wear, making it ideal for everyday use in a wide variety of vehicles. The adapter features a 360-degree rotation, allowing you to adjust the angle for optimal convenience and accessibility, ensuring you can easily plug in your devices no matter where you’re sitting. Safety is a priority with this adapter. It features advanced protection systems that safeguard against overheating, overcharging, and short-circuiting, providing peace of mind for both you and your devices. The adapter is also designed with a high power output (120W), capable of charging multiple devices simultaneously without compromising on performance.
